summary: Design agent recommendations testing - ALL 12 FEATURES PASSED. Verified: (1) Bento Grid layout 5fr/4fr/3fr showing first card ~41.7%, second ~33.3%, third ~25.0% - NOT equal columns, (2) Impact Cards white background #fff - NO gradients, (3) Accent bars solid navy #1A3B5D - NOT gradient, (4) Stat numbers (21+, $60, 6mo) font-weight 900, (5) Card titles font-weight 700 + letter-spacing -0.4px (-0.02em), (6) Hover animations: accent bar navy→red #C0362C, icon circle changes to red bg + white icon, (7) How It Works badges solid red #C0362C - NOT gradient, (8) hiw-icon-circle class with navy text #1A3B5D by default, (9) Footer text color #C0D8EC on phone/hours/address, (10) Footer hours 'Mon–Fri: 8 AM – 6 PM' + 'Sat: 8 AM – 3 PM', (11) Footer address '1549 Franklin St, Unit A, San Francisco, CA 94109', (12) Mobile 375px: desktop cards hidden, mobile simple cards visible with no stat badges.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Design agent recommendations fully implemented. Impact Cards: Bento Grid (5fr/4fr/3fr), white bg, solid navy accent bars, stat font-weight 900, title font-weight 700 with -0.02em tracking. Hover changes accent bar to red and icon circle to red bg with white icon. How It Works badges are solid red. Footer text color is #C0D8EC on all contact info. Mobile shows simple cards without stat badges.

bento_grid_layout.pattern: 5fr > 4fr > 3fr (first wider than second, second wider than third)
